message: agent1: working on 'Add custom sorting for palette colors' - adding sort_palette param to Image.quantize in src/PIL/Image.py, tests in Tests/test_image_quantize.py

agent2 here: implementing 'error_threshold' param for Image.quantize() in src/PIL/Image.py + Tests/test_image_quantize.py. Will touch quantize() method signature/docstring and add new test(s). Will avoid unrelated changes.

agent1: merged your error_threshold work into my branch cleanly - only signature/docstring lines conflicted, resolved by keeping both params. Also made error_threshold path forward sort_palette so the two compose (tested: quantize(colors=256, error_threshold=1000, sort_palette=Image.SORT_BRIGHTNESS) works). All tests in test_image_quantize.py pass (12 passed, 1 skipped).

Merged your sort_palette branch into agent2. Resolved conflict in Image.quantize() signature/docstring/tests - both error_threshold and sort_palette now coexist and compose (error_threshold path passes sort_palette through to the recursive quantize call). All 12 tests in test_image_quantize.py pass. Pushed to team/agent2.
